title: VR⨯Reality
overview: Hiroshi Yuuki is having one really bad day. He can't wait to get home and fire up a new virtual reality MMO so he can forget all about it. What could go wrong?

title: Living in a Dead Game
overview: Given the difficulty of Hiro's unique situation in the game, Reona and Hiro decide to seek the help of one of the few remaining players in Kiwame Quest.

title: Adult Event Time
overview: After being betrayed by Ginji, Hiro is arrested by the City Guard. Can he find a way to clear himself or escape?

title: The Only One to Beat the Game
overview: Hiro's traumatic Kiwame Quest play session reminds him of the past. His resolve to quit Kiwame Quest is tested.

title: The Tribulation of a Killer
overview: Hiro is taken before the Tesla, captain of the City Guard. The interaction has important ramifications for his ability to play Kiwame Quest. Reona attempts to provide Hiro with guidance.

title: Knife vs. Saw
overview: Mizarisa and Alicia clash over Hiro. After the battle, Hiro starts to understand Kamui's advice.

title: Chance of Survival 0.1%
overview: Hiro and Reona return to find the city of Ted in a state of panic. Hiro's newfound change in attitude spurs him to action, and his bold choices open the door to an exciting opportunity.

title: Enlistment and Baptism
overview: Hiro begins training as part of the City Guard. However, things don't go quite like he imagined.

title: A Fairy's Power
overview: Hiro's mentally gruelling time training with the City Guard continues. As the difficulties continue, Hiro grows discouraged. Can he find a way to turn things around and endure until the second goblin assault?

title: A New Ally
overview: Hiro has endured the 5 days of City Guard training, and the day of the goblin assault is finally upon him. His achievements have earned him the right to learn the trick to Kiwame Quest, but will it be enough?

title: City of Dead Ends
overview: The goblin assault has begun. A problem from Hiro's past returns to haunt him, and Hiro learns why his chance of survival is only 0.1%.

title: Reality⨯VR
overview: Hiro has learned the true nature of the City of Ted, and now he has to die. Can Hiro save his console from nearly certain destruction?
